initiatives.name: ResponsibleSteel Certification
initiatives.description: Achieved certification for four manufacturing sites (Vijayanagar, Dolvi, Salem, Tarapur).
initiatives.outcome: Over 80% of primary steel production from certified sites.

scope3Breakdown.note: Total Scope 3 included in emission summary.

enrichment.managementCommentary: We are committed to preventing, abating and mitigating our emissions to air. We have developed clear targets for decarbonisation and committed to be Net Neutral by 2050.

nonCompliance.description: Penalty from Chhattisgarh Environment Conservation Board for emission of smoke and improper tarpaulin covering.
nonCompliance.resolution: Fines of INR 360,000 and INR 570,000 remitted.

nonCompliance.description: Penalty for belated remittance of Provident Fund (2016–2019).
nonCompliance.resolution: Damages and interest of INR 18,314,378 remitted.

forwardLooking.description: Strive to achieve 'No Net Loss' of biodiversity

qualitativePolicies.P1_ethics: Policy covers ethics, anti-corruption, and eliminating all forms of bribery.
qualitativePolicies.P3_ohs: Strict safety systems leveraging real-time data and sensors in men-machine interfaces.
qualitativePolicies.P6_environment: Dedicated policies for air emissions, biodiversity, and resource conservation.
